title: Shiny! Mobs
body:
Shiny! add glowing versions of all the vanilla mobs with a small chance of one spawning in place of a normal version.

For now they are purely cosmetic.

Combined with [Jonn's Trophies](https://modrinth.com/mod/jonns-trophies) you can start making your own collection

Future plans include special drops, individual spawn rates and support for modded mobs.

[Discord](https://discord.gg/GjzhvFBU9z) for support

[![Sponsor Time](https://jonn.dk/akliz_banner_productivebees.png)](https://www.akliz.net/lobstermods)
